raw_sql:
SELECT it.info, it.id, COUNT(*) as cnt
FROM info_type it
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.info_type_id = it.id
JOIN title t ON t.id = mii.movie_id
WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
  AND t.kind_id = 1  -- movies only
GROUP BY it.info, it.id
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT 
  width_bucket(mii.info::numeric, 1, 10, 18) AS bucket,
  round(width_bucket(mii.info::numeric, 1, 10, 18) * 0.5 + 0.75, 1) AS approx_rating,
  COUNT(*) AS movie_count
FROM movie_info_idx mii
JOIN title t ON t.id = mii.movie_id
WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
  AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
  AND t.kind_id = 1
GROUP BY bucket
ORDER BY bucket;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN rt::int < 60 THEN 'under 60min'
    WHEN rt::int < 80 THEN '60-79min'
    WHEN rt::int < 100 THEN '80-99min'
    WHEN rt::int < 120 THEN '100-119min'
    WHEN rt::int < 150 THEN '120-149min'
    WHEN rt::int < 180 THEN '150-179min'
    ELSE '180min+'
  END AS runtime_bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
  round(AVG(mii.info::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
  round(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mii.info::numeric)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating
FROM movie_info_idx mii
JOIN title t ON t.id = mii.movie_id
JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id 
  AND mi.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes')
  AND mi.info ~ '^\d+$'
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (SELECT mi.info::int AS rt) x
WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
  AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
  AND t.kind_id = 1
  AND rt BETWEEN 1 AND 400
GROUP BY runtime_bucket
ORDER BY MIN(rt);

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN ((mi.info)::integer < 60) THEN 'under 60min'::text WHEN ((mi.info)::integer < 80) THEN '60-79min'::text WHEN ((mi.info)::integer < 100) THEN '80-99min'::text WHEN ((mi.info)::integer < 120) THEN '100-119min'::text WHEN ((mi.info)::integer < 150) THEN '120-149min'::text WHEN ((mi.info)::integer < 180) THEN '150-179min'::text ELSE '180min+'::text END)

raw_sql:
WITH director_credits AS (
  SELECT 
    ci.person_id,
    ci.movie_id,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ci.person_id ORDER BY t.production_year ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS prior_films
  FROM cast_info ci
  JOIN title t ON t.id = ci.movie_id
  WHERE ci.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'director')
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year <= 2009
),
target_films AS (
  SELECT 
    dc.movie_id,
    dc.prior_films
  FROM director_credits dc
  JOIN title t ON t.id = dc.movie_id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
)
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN prior_films = 0 THEN '0 (debut)'
    WHEN prior_films BETWEEN 1 AND 2 THEN '1-2'
    WHEN prior_films BETWEEN 3 AND 5 THEN '3-5'
    WHEN prior_films BETWEEN 6 AND 10 THEN '6-10'
    ELSE '11+'
  END AS director_prior_films,
  prior_films AS raw_prior,
  COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
  round(AVG(mii.info::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
  round(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mii.info::numeric)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating
FROM target_films tf
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = tf.movie_id AND mii.info_type_id = 101
GROUP BY director_prior_films, raw_prior
ORDER BY raw_prior;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN (dc.prior_films = 0) THEN '0 (debut)'::text WHEN ((dc.prior_films >= 1) AND (dc.prior_films <= 2)) THEN '1-2'::text WHEN ((dc.prior_films >= 3) AND (dc.prior_films <= 5)) THEN '3-5'::text WHEN ((dc.prior_films >= 6) AND (dc.prior_films <= 10)) THEN '6-10'::text ELSE '11+'::text END)

raw_sql:
WITH actor_credits AS (
  SELECT 
    ci.person_id,
    ci.movie_id,
    t.production_year,
    COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY ci.person_id ORDER BY t.production_year ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS prior_roles
  FROM cast_info ci
  JOIN title t ON t.id = ci.movie_id
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year <= 2009
),
film_cast_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    ac.movie_id,
    COUNT(*) AS cast_size,
    AVG(ac.prior_roles) AS avg_actor_experience,
    MAX(ac.prior_roles) AS max_actor_experience
  FROM actor_credits ac
  JOIN title t ON t.id = ac.movie_id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
  GROUP BY ac.movie_id
)
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN avg_actor_experience < 5 THEN '0-4'
    WHEN avg_actor_experience < 15 THEN '5-14'
    WHEN avg_actor_experience < 30 THEN '15-29'
    WHEN avg_actor_experience < 60 THEN '30-59'
    ELSE '60+'
  END AS avg_exp_bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
  round(AVG(mii.info::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
  round(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mii.info::numeric)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating
FROM film_cast_stats fcs
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = fcs.movie_id AND mii.info_type_id = 101
GROUP BY avg_exp_bucket
ORDER BY MIN(avg_actor_experience);

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN (fcs.avg_actor_experience < '5'::numeric) THEN '0-4'::text WHEN (fcs.avg_actor_experience < '15'::numeric) THEN '5-14'::text WHEN (fcs.avg_actor_experience < '30'::numeric) THEN '15-29'::text WHEN (fcs.avg_actor_experience < '60'::numeric) THEN '30-59'::text ELSE '60+'::text END)

raw_sql:
WITH company_film_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.company_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT mc.movie_id) AS total_films_produced
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1
    AND mc.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
  GROUP BY mc.company_id
),
film_top_company AS (
  SELECT 
    mc.movie_id,
    MAX(cfc.total_films_produced) AS top_company_size
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN company_film_counts cfc ON cfc.company_id = mc.company_id
  JOIN title t ON t.id = mc.movie_id
  WHERE t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = 1
    AND mc.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
)
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN top_company_size = 1 THEN '1 film (one-off)'
    WHEN top_company_size BETWEEN 2 AND 5 THEN '2-5'
    WHEN top_company_size BETWEEN 6 AND 20 THEN '6-20'
    WHEN top_company_size BETWEEN 21 AND 100 THEN '21-100'
    WHEN top_company_size BETWEEN 101 AND 500 THEN '101-500'
    ELSE '500+'
  END AS company_size_bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
  round(AVG(mii.info::numeric)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
  round(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY mii.info::numeric)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating
FROM film_top_company ftc
JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = ftc.movie_id AND mii.info_type_id = 101
GROUP BY company_size_bucket
ORDER BY MIN(top_company_size);

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN (ftc.top_company_size = 1) THEN '1 film (one-off)'::text WHEN ((ftc.top_company_size >= 2) AND (ftc.top_company_size <= 5)) THEN '2-5'::text WHEN ((ftc.top_company_size >= 6) AND (ftc.top_company_size <= 20)) THEN '6-20'::text WHEN ((ftc.top_company_size >= 21) AND (ftc.top_company_size <= 100)) THEN '21-100'::text WHEN ((ftc.top_company_size >= 101) AND (ftc.top_company_size <= 500)) THEN '101-500'::text ELSE '500+'::text END)

raw_sql:
WITH rated_films AS (
  SELECT mii.movie_id, mii.info::numeric AS rating
  FROM movie_info_idx mii
  JOIN title t ON t.id = mii.movie_id
  WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = 1
),
keyword_stats AS (
  SELECT 
    k.keyword,
    COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
    AVG(rf.rating) AS avg_rating,
    PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY rf.rating) AS median_rating
  FROM movie_keyword mk
  JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
  JOIN rated_films rf ON rf.movie_id = mk.movie_id
  GROUP BY k.keyword
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 150
)
SELECT keyword, movie_count, round(avg_rating::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating, round(median_rating::numeric, 2) AS median_rating
FROM keyword_stats
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC
LIMIT 30;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT 
    t.id AS movie_id,
    mii.info::numeric AS rating
  FROM movie_info_idx mii
  JOIN title t ON t.id = mii.movie_id
  WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = 1
),
runtime_info AS (
  SELECT movie_id, MAX(info::int) AS runtime
  FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes')
    AND info ~ '^\d+$'
  GROUP BY movie_id
),
genre_prestige AS (
  SELECT movie_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN info IN ('Biography','History','War','Animation','Documentary') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_prestige_genre,
    MAX(CASE WHEN info IN ('Horror','Action','Thriller') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_low_genre
  FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  GROUP BY movie_id
),
company_size AS (
  SELECT mc.movie_id, MAX(cnt.total) AS max_company_size
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN (
    SELECT company_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS total
    FROM movie_companies
    WHERE company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
    GROUP BY company_id
  ) cnt ON cnt.company_id = mc.company_id
  WHERE mc.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
)
SELECT
  CASE WHEN ri.runtime >= 120 THEN 'long(120+)' ELSE 'shorter' END AS runtime_cat,
  CASE WHEN gp.is_prestige_genre = 1 THEN 'prestige' WHEN gp.is_low_genre = 1 THEN 'low' ELSE 'mid' END AS genre_cat,
  CASE WHEN cs.max_company_size >= 100 THEN 'major(100+)' ELSE 'indie/mid' END AS company_cat,
  COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
  round(AVG(b.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
  round(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY b.rating)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating
FROM base b
LEFT JOIN runtime_info ri ON ri.movie_id = b.movie_id
LEFT JOIN genre_prestige gp ON gp.movie_id = b.movie_id
LEFT JOIN company_size cs ON cs.movie_id = b.movie_id
WHERE ri.runtime IS NOT NULL AND gp.is_prestige_genre IS NOT NULL AND cs.max_company_size IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY runtime_cat, genre_cat, company_cat
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN ((max(CASE WHEN (movie_info_1.info = ANY ('{Biography,History,War,Animation,Documentary}'::text[])) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) = 1) THEN 'prestige'::text WHEN ((max(CASE WHEN (movie_info_1.info = ANY ('{Horror,Action,Thriller}'::text[])) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)) = 1) THEN 'low'::text ELSE 'mid'::text END)

predicates: (max(CASE WHEN (movie_info_1.info = ANY ('{Biography,History,War,Animation,Documentary}'::text[])) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) IS NOT NULL)

raw_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT 
    t.id AS movie_id,
    mii.info::numeric AS rating,
    (mii.info::numeric >= 7.0)::int AS is_high
  FROM movie_info_idx mii
  JOIN title t ON t.id = mii.movie_id
  WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = 1
),
runtime_data AS (
  SELECT movie_id,
    CASE WHEN MAX(info::int) >= 120 THEN 'long(120+)' ELSE 'shorter' END AS cat
  FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes') AND info ~ '^\d+$'
  GROUP BY movie_id
),
genre_data AS (
  SELECT movie_id,
    CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN info IN ('Biography','History','War','Animation','Documentary') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'prestige'
         WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN info IN ('Horror','Action','Thriller') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1 THEN 'low'
         ELSE 'mid' END AS cat
  FROM movie_info
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  GROUP BY movie_id
),
company_data AS (
  SELECT mc.movie_id,
    CASE WHEN MAX(cnt.total) >= 100 THEN 'major(100+)' ELSE 'indie/mid' END AS cat
  FROM movie_companies mc
  JOIN (SELECT company_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS total FROM movie_companies
        WHERE company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
        GROUP BY company_id) cnt ON cnt.company_id = mc.company_id
  WHERE mc.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production companies')
  GROUP BY mc.movie_id
)
SELECT 
  'runtime' AS factor,
  rd.cat AS category,
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  round(AVG(b.is_high)*100, 1) AS pct_high_rated,
  round(AVG(b.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating
FROM base b JOIN runtime_data rd ON rd.movie_id = b.movie_id
GROUP BY rd.cat
UNION ALL
SELECT 'genre', gd.cat, COUNT(*), round(AVG(b.is_high)*100,1), round(AVG(b.rating)::numeric,3)
FROM base b JOIN genre_data gd ON gd.movie_id = b.movie_id
GROUP BY gd.cat
UNION ALL
SELECT 'company_size', cd.cat, COUNT(*), round(AVG(b.is_high)*100,1), round(AVG(b.rating)::numeric,3)
FROM base b JOIN company_data cd ON cd.movie_id = b.movie_id
GROUP BY cd.cat
ORDER BY factor, pct_high_rated DESC;

WITH rated_films AS (
  SELECT mii.movie_id, mii.info::numeric AS rating,
    (mii.info::numeric >= 7.0)::int AS is_high
  FROM movie_info_idx mii
  JOIN title t ON t.id = mii.movie_id
  WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = 1
),
cast_sizes AS (
  SELECT ci.movie_id, COUNT(DISTINCT ci.person_id) AS cast_size
  FROM cast_info ci
  JOIN title t ON t.id = ci.movie_id
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = 1
  GROUP BY ci.movie_id
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN cast_size = 0 THEN '0'
    WHEN cast_size BETWEEN 1 AND 5 THEN '1-5'
    WHEN cast_size BETWEEN 6 AND 15 THEN '6-15'
    WHEN cast_size BETWEEN 16 AND 30 THEN '16-30'
    WHEN cast_size BETWEEN 31 AND 60 THEN '31-60'
    ELSE '61+'
  END AS cast_size_bucket,
  COUNT(*) AS movie_count,
  round(AVG(rf.is_high)*100, 1) AS pct_high_rated,
  round(AVG(rf.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating,
  round(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY rf.rating)::numeric, 2) AS median_rating
FROM cast_sizes cs
JOIN rated_films rf ON rf.movie_id = cs.movie_id
GROUP BY cast_size_bucket
ORDER BY MIN(cast_size);

groupby_keys: (CASE WHEN ((count(DISTINCT ci.person_id)) = 0) THEN '0'::text WHEN (((count(DISTINCT ci.person_id)) >= 1) AND ((count(DISTINCT ci.person_id)) <= 5)) THEN '1-5'::text WHEN (((count(DISTINCT ci.person_id)) >= 6) AND ((count(DISTINCT ci.person_id)) <= 15)) THEN '6-15'::text WHEN (((count(DISTINCT ci.person_id)) >= 16) AND ((count(DISTINCT ci.person_id)) <= 30)) THEN '16-30'::text WHEN (((count(DISTINCT ci.person_id)) >= 31) AND ((count(DISTINCT ci.person_id)) <= 60)) THEN '31-60'::text ELSE '61+'::text END)

raw_sql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT t.id AS movie_id, mii.info::numeric AS rating,
    (mii.info::numeric >= 7.0)::int AS is_high
  FROM movie_info_idx mii
  JOIN title t ON t.id = mii.movie_id
  WHERE mii.info_type_id = 101
    AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2000 AND 2009
    AND t.kind_id = 1
),
prestige_keywords AS (
  SELECT mk.movie_id, 1 AS has_prestige_kw
  FROM movie_keyword mk
  JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id
  WHERE k.keyword IN (
    'tears','crying','dying','poverty','execution','sadness','tragic-event',
    'archive-footage','no-opening-credits','1940s','1990s','typewriter','reading'
  )
  GROUP BY mk.movie_id
),
runtime_data AS (
  SELECT movie_id,
    CASE WHEN MAX(info::int) >= 120 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_long
  FROM movie_info WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'runtimes') AND info ~ '^\d+$'
  GROUP BY movie_id
),
genre_data AS (
  SELECT movie_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN info IN ('Biography','History','War','Animation','Documentary') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS is_prestige
  FROM movie_info WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'genres')
  GROUP BY movie_id
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(rd.is_long, 0) AS long_runtime,
  COALESCE(gd.is_prestige, 0) AS prestige_genre,
  COALESCE(pk.has_prestige_kw, 0) AS prestige_keywords,
  COUNT(*) AS n,
  round(AVG(b.is_high)*100, 1) AS pct_high_rated,
  round(AVG(b.rating)::numeric, 3) AS avg_rating
FROM base b
LEFT JOIN runtime_data rd ON rd.movie_id = b.movie_id
LEFT JOIN genre_data gd ON gd.movie_id = b.movie_id
LEFT JOIN prestige_keywords pk ON pk.movie_id = b.movie_id
WHERE rd.is_long IS NOT NULL AND gd.is_prestige IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY COALESCE(rd.is_long,0), COALESCE(gd.is_prestige,0), COALESCE(pk.has_prestige_kw,0)
ORDER BY avg_rating DESC;

predicates: (CASE WHEN (max((movie_info.info)::integer) >= 120) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END IS NOT NULL)
(max(CASE WHEN (movie_info_1.info = ANY ('{Biography,History,War,Animation,Documentary}'::text[])) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) IS NOT NULL)
